ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一个不在场的镇民角色。如果幻视死亡，当晚你转变为邪恶阵营。[+幻视]
firstNightReminder: Show the character token of 1 not-in-play Townsfolk.
otherNightReminder: If the Vision died today or tonight, the Scarlet Witch is 唤醒n and informed of their new alignment.
flavor: I used to think of myself one way. But, after this. I am something else. I'm still me, I think. But... that's not what everyone else sees.
